message:
bd-1s1g.7: add FxHash collision and DoS resistance tests

Validates FxHash-based NodeMap/EdgeMap resilience:

- sequential_ids_distribute_uniformly: verify no clustering
- nodemap_performance_under_load: 100K insert/lookup perf
- tombstone_resilience: mixed insert/delete patterns
- fxhash_faster_than_siphash: document performance gain
- graceful_degradation_under_collisions: crafted collisions
- nodeset_basic_operations: FxHashSet validation
- edgemap_basic_operations: edge index map validation
- threat_model_documented: security rationale

8 tests validate that non-cryptographic FxHash is safe for
internally-generated NodeId/EdgeId values (not user-controlled).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
